transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
Today I have frozen pork belly
And 4 servings of Bibimmyeon (Spicy Cold Noodles)
This is 2kg total
I bought it from Kwon Jae Kwan's place Got it delivered
This is 4 packs of Paldo Bibimmyeon
Should I put some ice?
That's too much
Frozen pork belly
Before I start grilling,
It's been a while since I had this and it's delicious
So good
I have to eat it with the meat
It's taking too long to cook
I better put a lot on the grill then
Let's eat more noodles

I was going to wait
Pork belly tastes best with the Bibimmeyon
Well-cooked
Dip in pickled wild leek
Look at this Unbelievable
Dip a little
I want to eat like this everyday It's so delicious
I don't need to cut it
Dip in Ssamjang (Soybean seasoning paste)
Frozen pork belly tastes better than the unfrozen ones
Dip
It's such a good combination
Unbelievable
There's no way
[Chat: It's not cooked] Yes, look at it
This is perfect

Wild leek
It's taking forever to cook
I want to eat it already
There's 1 here
Pop the egg yolk
Mix it up
[Chat: We respect your preference] But this is how they give you at the restaurants
Let's take this out
It tastes best this way
The grease bowl is overflowing
With ssamjang
Why's the lettuce leaf so small?
It's spicy, but it's okay
It's cooked like bacon
I have to save some noodles for the meat
You guys know that distinct pork belly taste, right?

It just has a very good scent
A good quality meat
It tastes so much better than the ones they sell at the markets
So good
This mukbang is going to end so soon
I feel like I'm eating too fast
Hot
This is the best
Just like this
It's perfect how it is right now I don't even need kimchi
I don't like it if it's cooked this much
When it's moderately cooked, it's so tender and soft
It because too hard when overcooked
For my standards
I'm so touched
This can't go wrong

Take this out And cook a new batch
I'll cook a little bit of kimchi
I think it's better when it's not cooked
It should taste good either way
Oh no! Can't cook this
It's the best with the noodles
Yum
Now we're speeding things up
Cooked well
I don't like rice that much
4 strips
That's not enough food
I never eat meat this fast Pork belly cooks pretty fast now
Faster than beef
Or did I just eat fast?
I thought I was interacting with the chat

[Chat: Because it's thin] No, that's not it because it was 2kg I weighed it myself
I have to save the noodles
But I ate everything..
I don't think I can fit this in 1 bite
Pickled leek
Kimchi
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
